description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a variable DOCKER_IMG set to registry.gitlab.com/offa/plug/ci and uses it to build the Docker image for the job. Add a single job named build_all that runs in the default test stage, uses the image ${DOCKER_IMG}/$COMPILER-$VERSION:latest, and executes in a parallel matrix over COMPILER values gcc and clang and VERSION values 10, 9, 8, 7. In each parallel instance the script should echo the current $COMPILER and $VERSION, then run $CC --version to display the compiler version. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are required.
